---
title: "EcoSAR"
author: "Esperance Kandjale"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---
**EcoSAR** is an R package for processing and analyzing **Sentinel-1 radar** data using **Google Earth Engine**.  
It allows you to load radar images, compute statistics (mean backscatter), detect flooded areas, and extract values by polygons.
---

### ️Installation
Install dependencies if not already done:

```r
For rgee (Google Earth Engine)
install.packages("rgee")
library(rgee)

### Load your local EcoSAR package
library(devtools)
load_all("C:/R_Package/EcoSAR")  # path to your package
library(EcoSAR)

### Python Configuration for rgee : Point R to your rgee Miniconda environment
library(reticulate)
use_python("C:/Users/PC/miniconda3/envs/rgee/python.exe", required = TRUE)

### Initialize Google Earth Engine
ee_Initialize(force = TRUE)

### Example Usage 

### Define Area of Interest (AOI) and Dates
#### Bounding box format: xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax
bbox_test <- c(15, -4, 15.5, -3.5)
start_date <- "2023-01-01"
end_date   <- "2023-01-31"

#### Load Sentinel-1 Images
radar_col <- radar_load(
  start_date  = start_date,
  end_date    = end_date,
  bbox        = bbox_test,
  polarization = "VV"
)
print(radar_col)

### Compute Mean Radar Backscatter
radar_mean <- radar_summary(radar_col)
print(radar_mean)

### Flood Detection (Simple Threshold)
flood_mask <- radar_flood(
  img       = radar_mean,
  threshold = -15,
  aoi       = ee$Geometry$Rectangle(bbox_test)
)
print(flood_mask)

### Extract Mean Values per Polygon
poly_fc <- ee$FeatureCollection(
  ee$Feature(
    ee$Geometry$Rectangle(bbox_test),
    list(name = "TestPolygon")
  )
)

### Radar mean
extracted_radar <- radar_extract_polygons(radar_mean, poly_fc)
print(extracted_radar$first()$getInfo())

### Flood mask (0/1)
extracted_flood <- radar_extract_polygons(flood_mask, poly_fc)
print(extracted_flood$first()$getInfo())

### Main Functions
| Function                   | Description                                         |
| -------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| `radar_load()`             | Loads Sentinel-1 images for a given period and area |
| `radar_summary()`          | Computes mean backscatter over an image collection  |
| `radar_flood()`            | Generates a flood mask using a threshold            |
| `radar_extract_polygons()` | Extracts mean radar values for polygons             |
| `radar_visualize()`        | Visualizes radar images or masks in RStudio         |
### Notes
This package is intended for scientific and exploratory use on Sentinel-1 radar data.
Make sure your Google Earth Engine account is active before using the package.
Color palettes and thresholds can be adjusted according to your needs.

Developed by Esperance Kandjale, 2026.
